title: A Day at the Zoo
synopsis: A child spends an exciting day at the zoo and discovers a new favorite animal.
sentences: Ruben visited the zoo with his cousins during the spring holiday.
The first animal they saw was a tall giraffe eating leaves from a tree.
Ruben laughed because the giraffe's tongue looked longer than his hand.
Next they watched monkeys swing from rope to rope inside a large play area.
One monkey stole a leaf from another and ran away very quickly.
At the elephant house, the ground shook a little under the animals' heavy feet.
Ruben liked the lions best because they looked both lazy and powerful.
He stood quietly while one lion lifted its head and looked straight ahead.
Later the family ate sandwiches near the penguin pool.
The penguins splashed so much that small drops landed on Ruben's shoes.
Before leaving, Ruben bought a postcard with a lion on it.
He said he wanted to come back and see the animals all over again.
